title: HLS Supplies DG-15 20L Degreaser Cleaner - Degreaser Kitchen Heavy Duty
features: Kitchen Degreaser - Fantastic for degreasing commercial kitchen equipment. DG-15 is recommended for use in all forms of manufacturing and food industries where cleaning and degreasing is a requirement. Specially formulated for hard surface cleaning and degreasing, designed for removing the most stubborn of soiling with ease and economy.

Multi Purpose - Safe to use on most surfaces including, metals, plastics, ceramics, concrete, brick, tarmac, wood and painted surfaces, also unlike many degreasers it is completely safe to use on glass. Designed for the removal of soiling such as carbon, nicotine, petrol, diesel, heavy fuel oil and greases, body fats in shower areas, food fats and grease from kitchen areas.

Easy to Use - DG-15 can be applied using a spray bottle, trigger spray, or mop and bucket system. For General cleaning dilute 1 part DG-15 with up to 20 parts water, adjusting the ratio based on the degree of soiling. For stubborn areas use a stronger dilution of 1:10. Apply to surface, allow brief contact time, then wipe or rinse thoroughly. For kitchen equipment and surfaces use at 1:20 dilution. Apply with cloth or spray then rinse thoroughly with clean water to remove all residue.

Large Range of Sizes - Need more? Choose from 5L, 2 x 5L, 4 x 5L, 20L and 25L options, meaning no job is too large for our DG-15 degreaser. Our concentrated formula means less product used per application.

HLS Supplies - Developed and Manufactured in the UK, our mission is to manufacture effective cleaning solutions for a broad spectrum of applications, including domestic, commercial, automotive, and industrial. Our range of cleaning chemicals is carefully crafted to ensure superior performance across all intended applications.
description: Product Description HLS DG-15 Kitchen Degreaser - Fast Acting | All Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser 20L DG-15 All Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser is a specially formulated hard surface cleaner and degreaser designed for removing the most stubborn of soiling with ease and economy. This powerful degreaser is 100% miscible with water and can be diluted with up to 20 parts water whilst remaining an effective cleaner. DG-15 All purpose cleaner & degreaser contains no harmful solvents. Because of its degreasing strength it is always recommended to wear gloves when using the product. DG-15 All purpose cleaner & degreaser is safe to use on most surfaces including, metals, plastics, ceramics, concrete, brick, tarmac, wood, painted surfaces and is completely safe to use on glass. Features: • Super effective all purpose cleaner & degreaser • Can be diluted with up to 20 parts water • Great for use in catering applications Perfect for cleaning most hard surfaces DG-15 Kitchen Degreraser is the go to choice for professionals around the UK DG-15 All Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser key features include: Can be used on all types of hard surfaces Can be diluted with up to 20 parts water Popular choice for catering, kitchen and office cleaning DG-15 Kitchen Degreaser - Fast Acting | All Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser 20L All Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser for all Surfaces DG-15 All purpose cleaner & degreaser can also be used for the removal of soiling such as carbon, smokez & vapez residue, petrol, diesel, heavy fuel oil and greases, body fats in shower areas, food fats and grease from kitchen areas. DG-15 All purpose cleaner & degreaser is recommended for use in all forms of manufacturing industries and food industries where cleaning and degreasing is a requirement. DG-15 All Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser can be used to: Clean and degrease most hard surfaces Degrease kitchen equipment Clean gym equipment Clean walls ,floors, extractor fans & ducting Remove body fat and soap scum from tiles All Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser used by professionals throughout the UK DG-15 All Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser is a specially formulated hard surface cleaner and degreaser designed for removing the most stubborn of soiling with ease and economy. This powerful degreaser is 100% miscible with water and can be diluted with up to 20 parts water whilst remaining an effective cleaner. DG-15 All purpose cleaner & degreaser contains no harmful solvents as is found in most economy degreasers. Because of its degreasing strength it is always recommended to wear gloves when using the product. DG-15 All purpose cleaner & degreaser is safe to use on most surfaces including, metals, plastics, ceramics, concrete, brick, tarmac, wood, painted surfaces and, unlike many degreasers, is completely safe to use on glass. Features: • Super effective all purpose cleaner & degreaser • Can be diluted with up to 20 parts water • Great for use in catering applications DG-15 All purpose cleaner & degreaser is fantastic for use as a catering degreaser where it will quickly degrease all hard kitchen surfaces with ease! DG-15 All purpose cleaner & degreaser is one of our most loved products by our customers. Use DG-15 All purpose cleaner & degreaser to: • Clean and degrease most hard surfaces • Degrease kitchen equipment • Clean gym equipment • Clean walls & floors • Remove body fat and soap scum from tiles • Clean extractor fans and ducting HLS DG-15 - All Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser 20L The professionals choice for cleaning and degreasing floors, walls and other hard surfaces in the catering and commercial sectors.
